description: Single SKU, multiple listings, unified stock

items.name: Master SKU concept
items.tactic: One canonical SKU in DB. Linked to N listings. One inventory pool.

items.name: Multi-listing updates
items.tactic: Stock change DB → push ALL listings simultaneously. Prevent overselling.

items.name: Price differentiation
items.tactic: Same SKU, different prices per platform (Amazon ACoS, eBay, Shopify). Legal optimal.

items.name: Inventory split
items.tactic: 100 units: 40 ML, 30 Amazon, 20 Shopify, 10 backup. Rebalance weekly.

items.name: Zero-stock sync
items.tactic: Inventory hits 0 → delist ALL platforms in <5min via Computer Use.
